mentions.note: Weakness more related to Ken View acquisition; CEO Michael Shuh doing fantastic job despite headwinds; 5% yield at 13x earnings very intriguing.
Ultimate consumer staples company; essential products; solid dividend holding.
Reports Tuesday morning; expect better quarter than P&G; merging with Kleenex in cash-stock deal but warming up to stock after P&G and Clorox rallies.
Quality diversified name; essential if investor unwilling to own speculative quantum/flying car/battery stocks.

Caller Dave concerned 6-alarm fire at toilet paper distribution center. CEO Mike Shoemate handling well. 5.25% yield, 13x P/E. Cramer bullish: 'even though at 13x earnings, I think you should buy more. Average down.' High conviction on dividend and CEO.
5%+ yield with fantastic Capital View merger deal expected to produce tremendous returns; stock not rewarded yet but deal fundamentals sound.

Premier consumer staple brands (Kleenex, Kotex, Huggies, Pull-Ups) at 13x earnings, 5.25% dividend yield. Merging with J&J consumer division; Michael Shu (terrific operator) running integration of world-class portfolio.
